## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Configure '...'
3. Enter Play mode / rotate camera '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include screenshots or a short clip if it's a visual issue.

## Environment

- **Unity version:** (e.g. 6000.4.8f1)
- **Render pipeline:** (URP / built-in / HDRP)
- **Platform:** (Editor / Windows / macOS / Android / etc.)

## Console Output

```
Paste any relevant errors or warnings here.
```

## Additional Context

Anything else that might help (custom USS, unusual setup, etc.).
